description: Calculate land cover statistics for management zones using the vector layer at /home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_polygon.geojson and the land cover raster at /home/ga/GIS_Data/rasters/landcover.tif (where 1=Water, 2=Forest, 3=Urban). Calculate the percentage of Water pixels (Class 1) relative to the total sum of all classes (1+2+3) and store it in a new decimal field named 'pct_water'. Export the final result, including the histogram counts and the new percentage field, to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/zone_composition.geojson.
